case_title: DAGLE, MARK DBA ELITE CABINETRY VS OU INTERESTS et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAGLE, MARK DBA  ELITE CABINETRY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OU INTERESTS W2D  ARCHITECTS $2,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,475.00, DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE AS TO W2D ARCHITECTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
POS UNTIMELY NO SERVED 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING.
O/C-CASE WAS RESET TO 10-10-95 @ 8:30 AM. PRIOR TO THE TIME THE CASE WAS CALLED ON 9-7-95. THERE IS NO JUDGMENT AT THIS TIME.
INVALID POS FILED. NO MAILING ON SUB-SERVICE.
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-10-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C TRIAL OF SEP-07-1995 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
MAILED BACK TO PLTFF HIS $50.00 CHECK W/ INSTRUCTIONS F/SERVICE THRU SHERIFFS DEPT.
